parameters.responseBody:
={
  "success": true,
  "user_id": "{{ $('Aggregate Results').first().json.user_id }}",
  "tools_configured": {{ $('Aggregate Results').first().json.tools_inserted }},
  "tools_processed": {{ $('Aggregate Results').first().json.tools_processed }},
  "tool_ids": {{ JSON.stringify($('Aggregate Results').first().json.tool_ids) }},
  "all_configs_ok": {{ $('Aggregate Results').first().json.all_ok }},
  "configured_at": "{{ $('Aggregate Results').first().json.now }}"
}
